scope: Diagnostic: whether odd-u step-6 (and related) maps are single-valued as Fin-256→Fin-256 on admissible residue classes. Not a state-graph proof.

claim_under_test.statement: u1 ≡ u2 (mod 256) and u ≡ 3 (mod 4) imply syracuseOddStep(step5Terminal u1) ≡ syracuseOddStep(step5Terminal u2) (mod 256)

recommended_next_step: Do NOT introduce a Fin-256→Fin-256 odd-u edge. Prove the multi-valued collision in Lean (e.g. u=3 vs u=259). Optionally investigate a domain-mod-512 / image-mod-256 edge (empirically single-valued for the affine odd-v shell) — still not Fin-512→Fin-512, and not a full graph.
